name: Drama
description: Films focused on realistic storytelling, emotional themes and character development. Explores the human condition through conflict and growth.
typical_themes: Family conflicts, personal struggles, moral dilemmas, redemption, identity

name: Sci-Fi
description: Science fiction films explore futuristic concepts, advanced technology, space exploration, time travel and extraterrestrial life.
typical_themes: Artificial intelligence, space exploration, dystopian futures, time travel, humanity vs technology

name: Crime
description: Films centered around criminal activities, organized crime, heists, investigations and the moral gray areas of law and order.
typical_themes: Power, loyalty, betrayal, justice, corruption, the criminal underworld

name: Action
description: High-energy films featuring physical feats, chase sequences, fights, explosions and adrenaline-pumping scenarios.
typical_themes: Good vs evil, survival, heroism, revenge, justice

name: Thriller
description: Films designed to create suspense, excitement and anxiety. Often involve mystery, danger and unexpected plot twists.
typical_themes: Conspiracy, psychological manipulation, survival, identity, trust

name: Animation
description: Films created using animation techniques. Spans all ages and genres — from family-friendly to mature artistic works.
typical_themes: Coming of age, friendship, family, imagination, overcoming fear

name: Horror
description: Films intended to frighten, unsettle and disturb. Ranges from supernatural terror to psychological horror and body horror.
typical_themes: Fear of the unknown, death, isolation, paranoia, supernatural forces

name: Comedy
description: Films primarily designed to amuse and make audiences laugh through situations, dialogue and characters.
typical_themes: Social commentary, relationships, identity, absurdity, everyday life

name: Romance
description: Films focusing on love stories, relationships and emotional connections between characters.
typical_themes: Love, heartbreak, sacrifice, destiny, cultural differences

name: War
description: Films set during wartime that explore military conflict, the human cost of war and the moral complexities of combat.
typical_themes: Sacrifice, brotherhood, morality of war, survival, trauma, heroism

name: Western
description: Films set in the American West, exploring frontier life, cowboys, outlaws, and the mythology of the Wild West.
typical_themes: Justice, freedom, survival, moral ambiguity, civilization vs wilderness

name: Fantasy
description: Films featuring magical elements, mythical creatures and imaginary worlds beyond the boundaries of reality.
typical_themes: Good vs evil, mythology, heroic quests, magic, identity
